about.title: About ClickOne AI
about.subtitle: Transforming customer service with artificial intelligence.
about.missionText: Help service businesses answer, respond and follow up with customers automatically and intelligently, using artificial intelligence to increase efficiency, organization and conversion.
about.visionText: To be the leading artificial intelligence platform for customer service and operations for service businesses, eliminating human failures in the response, follow-up and scheduling process.
about.practiceTitle: How we put this into practice
about.practiceConclusion: All integrated into a single platform, created to operate at the pace of service businesses.

voiceProduct.title: Intelligent Phone Service
voiceProduct.subtitle: Our voice AI answers calls, qualifies leads and schedules services automatically. Never lose a customer for not answering the phone again.
voiceProduct.featuresSubtitle: Cutting-edge technology for impeccable phone service.
voiceProduct.feature1Desc: Conversational AI with natural voice that your customers won't realize is a robot.
voiceProduct.feature2Desc: Uninterrupted service, including nights, weekends and holidays.
voiceProduct.feature3Desc: Integrates with your calendar and schedules services automatically.
voiceProduct.feature4Desc: Collects essential information before transferring to you.
voiceProduct.feature5Desc: Service in Portuguese, English, Spanish and other languages.
voiceProduct.feature6Desc: Complete dashboard with call and conversion metrics.
voiceProduct.step1Desc: The call is automatically directed to our AI.
voiceProduct.step2Desc: Personalized greeting and fluid conversation like a human.
voiceProduct.step3Desc: Service type, address, availability and urgency.
voiceProduct.step4Desc: Books in your calendar or transfers to you if necessary.
voiceProduct.benefit3: Up to 70% savings compared to traditional receptionists
voiceProduct.ctaTitle: Ready to Automate Your Phone Service?
voiceProduct.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free demo and hear our AI in action.

chatProduct.title: Chat and Message Automation
chatProduct.subtitle: Our AI responds to text messages, qualifies leads and does automatic follow-up on SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram and more.
chatProduct.channelsSubtitle: Centralize all your conversations on a single intelligent platform.
chatProduct.featuresSubtitle: Cutting-edge technology for natural and efficient conversations.
chatProduct.feature1Desc: SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook Messenger and website chat in one platform.
chatProduct.feature2Desc: Response time of less than 3 seconds, 24 hours a day.
chatProduct.feature3Desc: Customers schedule services directly through conversation.
chatProduct.feature4Desc: Message sequences to nurture leads and recover customers.
chatProduct.feature5Desc: Natural conversation in Portuguese, English, Spanish and more.
chatProduct.feature6Desc: Track conversions, response time and satisfaction.
chatProduct.useCase1Desc: Respond to website forms in seconds, not hours.
chatProduct.useCase2Desc: Send reminders and offers to inactive customers.
chatProduct.useCase4Desc: Request reviews after each completed service.
chatProduct.benefit4: Integration with CRM and existing tools
chatProduct.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free demo and see AI talking to your customers.

smallBusiness.title: AI Service for
smallBusiness.subtitle: Stop losing customers because you can't answer the phone. Our AI handles service while you focus on what you do best: your work.
smallBusiness.problemSubtitle: When you're the owner, technician and receptionist at the same time, something always falls behind.
smallBusiness.withoutAI2: Frustrated customers due to no response
smallBusiness.benefitsTitle: Why small businesses choose ClickOne AI
smallBusiness.benefit1Desc: Never miss a call, even outside business hours or on weekends.
smallBusiness.benefit2Desc: Save on salaries, taxes and training for customer service staff.
smallBusiness.benefit3Desc: Respond to leads in seconds and schedule more customers automatically.
smallBusiness.benefit4Desc: AI trained to represent your company with quality and friendliness.
smallBusiness.useCase3: Schedule customers without interrupting your work
smallBusiness.useCase5: Qualify customers before returning the call
smallBusiness.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free demo and see how ClickOne AI can transform your small business service.

mediumBusiness.title: AI Service for
mediumBusiness.subtitle: Scale your service operation without increasing fixed costs. Consistent and professional service at any volume.
mediumBusiness.problemSubtitle: Medium businesses face a dilemma: growing the service team is expensive, but not growing limits the business.
mediumBusiness.challenge2: High cost to maintain receptionists on shifts
mediumBusiness.solution2: Predictable fixed cost, no labor charges
mediumBusiness.benefit1Desc: Serve more customers without hiring additional receptionists.
mediumBusiness.benefit2Desc: Complete service metrics for data-driven decisions.
mediumBusiness.benefit3Desc: Connect AI to your current system without complications.
mediumBusiness.benefit4Desc: Custom scripts and flows for your specific operation.
mediumBusiness.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free demo and discover how ClickOne AI can help your company grow without complications.

localBusiness.title: AI Service for
localBusiness.subtitle: Dominate your region with instant service. Be the first to respond and win more customers in your area.
localBusiness.challengesSubtitle: In local businesses, response speed is everything. Who answers first, wins.
localBusiness.challenge1: Fierce competition with other local companies
localBusiness.challenge2: Customers who call once and go to competition
localBusiness.benefitsTitle: How ClickOne AI helps local businesses
localBusiness.benefitsSubtitle: Instant service that turns leads into loyal customers in your region.
localBusiness.benefit1Desc: Service that knows your region and speaks your customers' language.
localBusiness.benefit2Desc: 100% of calls answered, even when you're in service.
localBusiness.benefit3Desc: Customers book directly in your calendar without your intervention.
localBusiness.benefit4Desc: Phone, WhatsApp, Instagram and Facebook on one platform.
localBusiness.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a free demo and see how ClickOne AI can make you be the first to respond, always.

franchiseNetwork.title: AI Service for
franchiseNetwork.subtitle: Standardize service across your entire network. Centralized control, guaranteed quality at each location.
franchiseNetwork.problemTitle: The challenge of managing multiple locations
franchiseNetwork.problemSubtitle: Each franchise is an extension of your brand. Inconsistent service affects the entire network.
franchiseNetwork.challenge2: Difficult to monitor each franchise's performance
franchiseNetwork.solution2: Centralized dashboard with metrics by branch
franchiseNetwork.benefit1Desc: Same quality at all locations, ensuring brand consistency.
franchiseNetwork.benefit2Desc: Complete view of all locations' performance in real time.
franchiseNetwork.benefit3Desc: Monitor and ensure service standards across the entire network.
franchiseNetwork.benefit4Desc: Exclusive account manager and priority support for your network.
franchiseNetwork.enterpriseFeature2: Custom scripts by location or region
franchiseNetwork.testimonial1: Managing service for 15 locations was a nightmare. With ClickOne AI, we have standards at all franchises and full visibility in one dashboard.
franchiseNetwork.testimonial2: Our franchisees loved it. They focus on service while AI handles customer service. Customer satisfaction increased 40% across the network.
franchiseNetwork.ctaSubtitle: Schedule an enterprise demo and discover how ClickOne AI can transform service across your entire franchise network.

testimonials.carlos: The demo was amazing! In 30 minutes, I understood exactly how AI would work for my cleaning company.
testimonials.roberto: After the demo, it became clear how much I was losing in unanswered calls. I signed up the same day.
testimonials.ana: The team was very attentive and the demo was super personalized for my business.
testimonials.diego: I never thought automating my service would be so simple. The demo convinced me!
